title: crocodeilanthe verbiformis
side_effects: Crocodeilanthe verbiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems. Some common side effects include headaches, dizziness, and nausea, which can be exacerbated if the plant is ingested in large quantities. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause kidney damage, liver failure, and even cardiac arrest in severe cases. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the Crocodeilanthe verbiformis plant for medicinal purposes to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
